name: Contact
description: Contact page with editorial intro and a form rendered by the Forms extension

fields.heading: Let's start a conversation.
fields.body: Have a question, a partnership idea, or just want to see if Squilla is right for your team? We read every message and respond within one business day.

items.question: How do I create the contact form?
items.answer: Visit Admin → Forms and create a new form with slug contact. The block on this page will pick it up automatically.

items.question: Can I migrate from another CMS?
items.answer: Yes — Squilla can import content via the MCP server. See the docs for details.
